# Sidqly: Premium Islamic Operating Platform

Sidqly is a specialized operating system for mosques, Islamic charities, and non-profits, focusing on trust, transparency, and dignity-safe giving operations.

## Core Information
- **Official Website:** https://sidqly.com
- **Core Mission:** Simplifying giving operations while ensuring absolute donor trust and recipient dignity.
- **Key Features:** Manual payment review, Proof Trust Engine, QR verification, Campaign management (Qurbani, Ramadan, Zakat), Professional reporting.

## Action Links
- **Book a Demo:** https://calendly.com/d/dvzs-3zf-cgz
- **Detailed Inquiry Form:** https://forms.gle/bvSMog9pw2Ri4kMt9
- **Contact Email:** team@sidqly.com

## Payment Details (Pakistan)
- **Method:** Easypaisa Pakistan
- **IBAN:** PK19TMFB0000000060685814
- **Confirmation:** team@sidqly.com
